S ECTOPICS MULTIPLE LIVING 2 2 2 Past Medical History Discussed Past Medical History HPI 97 year old lady here for ffup post ER visit. UMC ER Dec 29, 2025 97 year old lady was found on the floor. with intermittent falls for the past 3 months. slight BL UE weakness---per ER likely due to deconditioning and difficulty following instructions on exam. Dx: Fall; open nasal fracture; closed C6 spinous process fracture; elevated troponin; facial laceration; meds upon dc: continued on eliquis 2.5 mg bid; pravastatin 40; pantoprazole 40 mg; calcitriol; allopurinol 100 mg 1/2 tab; donepezil 5 mg; escitalopram 5 mg; trazodone as needed qhs. EKG Dec 26, 2025 with aflutter labs Dec 26, 2025 with: 1) troponin 50, 44; 2) CK 282; 3) AST 46; ALT 12; 4) egfr 38; 5) normal cbc, CT C Spine Dec 26, 2025 with: 1) acute minimally displaced C6 spinous process fracture 2) 1.4 cm hyperdense R parotid nodule--refer to ENT CT Maxillofacial Dec 26, 2025 with: 1) comminuted fractures of nasal arch, nasal septum, 2) subcutaneous emphysema; 3) soft tissue swelling over the nares, bridge of nose; 4) L periorbital and frontal soft tissue swelling CT Head Dec 26, 2025 without acute findings son claims to stay home with patient. declines placement in assisted/memory care due to cost. most recently seen Dec 2, 2025 seen Aug 26, 2025 for MAWV son declines losing P3HP as PCP, declining hospice care but willing to consider Palliative medicine only. advance directives-no copy although son verbalizes wish for DNR. discussed today. POLST reviewed and signed. even now, son is still in the process of acquiring guardianship ---patient has seen Neuro, and switched to Dr. G. Chopra from previous Neuro due to lack of access. she is required to have EEG, MRI, psychiatry clearance prior to Neuro agreeing to sign papers for guardianship. in the meantime, son has verbalized patient to have DNR status. POLST done today reflects the same. today, complains: 1) that memory seems to be worsening. unable to perform MMSE due to language barrier. Neurotrack screening-- attempted today. has hearing loss, but refuses to wear her hearing aids. 2) fell 3 weeks ago while home. son noted the day after that she had a bump on the left forehead above the brow. denies LOC, pain in back or hips or arm. labs June 18, 2025 with: 1) pyuria and culture does not satisfy dx of UTI. asymptomatic athena 3/23/2026 4:55:10 pm EDT fb3e80d9-032e-4ec4-89ae-e0cbc378c289 Page: 08 / 13 P3 Health Partners NV 2831 Business Park Ct, LAS VEGAS NV 89128-9000 MIZRAHI, Gaby (id #843, dob: 12/04/1928) 2) uric acid 3.4 comprehensive panel May 12, 20225 with: 1) egfr 45 from 51, 39, 41, 46, stable 2) LDL 79; HDL 62, TGL 55 3) uric acid 4.1 labs Oct 30, 2024 with: 1) UTI--augmentin rx sent most recently seen June 25, 2024 comprehensive panel April 2, 2024 with: 1) egfr 51; 2) hypoproteinemia with hypoalbuminemia-increase protein PO intake. recheck 3 mos 3) LDL 94; HDL 71; TGL 72 4) normal cbc, LFT, TSH 1.82, alb/crea negative; PTH 63; uric acid 3.3; iron panel, ferritin 5) UTI--augmentin rx sent labs Nov 21, 2023 with: 1) normalized cbc, with normalized iron level labs Oct 24, 2023 with: 1) proteinuria, pyuria 2) egfr 39 from previous 41, 45, 42, 51, 52 3) low protein level with normal albumin labs Sept 21, 2023 with: 1) hgb 11 from 11.4 in July 2023 and 13.5;
